content:
APPROVED: Excellent plan! Your approach is well-considered:

✅ Recognized existing Logger implementation
✅ Minimal, phased approach (Phase 1 recommended)
✅ Clear file modifications
✅ Lightweight and practical

Proceed with Phase 1 implementation. Focus on:
1. Export Logger from mypackage/__init__.py
2. Create module-level default logger instance
3. Add basic usage documentation
4. Update __all__ exports

Keep it simple and lightweight as requested. Well done!

content: Charlie - Your logging utility plan has been APPROVED. Please proceed with Phase 1 implementation as outlined. Keep it minimal and lightweight. The existing Logger class is solid - just make it more accessible across the project.
